claims.claim: Generation lease schema is defined with required fields.
claims.evidence: Verifier checks manifest, script literals, and lease self-test.

claims.claim: Refresh is disabled by default and only allowed by owner diagnostic flag.
claims.evidence: Script defines ALLOW_BROWSER_REFRESH_DIAGNOSTIC.flag and default RefreshMinutes 0.

claims.claim: Active lease blocks browser refresh and prompt resubmission.
claims.evidence: Script guard exits before delegating original watcher while leaseStatus is active.

claims.claim: Exact ZIP routing evidence is required.
claims.evidence: Route-ExpectedZip writes expectedZipName, sourcePath, destinationPath, sha256, fileSize, stabilityCheckResult, routeTimestamp, routeMode.
Manifest and script preserve saved target only, no random/new-chat fallback, no credentials, no paid services, no production deploy, no self-merge.

nonGoals: Does not run multi-phase autopilot batches.
Does not modify external accounts or GitHub settings.
Does not guarantee ChatGPT itself will generate an artifact; it prevents watcher interruption and creates deterministic evidence.
